author: SypherPK
text:
I Spent A Week With Fortnite's BEST Pro Players
This week I traveled to the FNCS Major 1 Summit Finals in Düsseldorf, Germany! I met so many pro players from all across the world and spectated the biggest Fortnite tournament of 2026 (so far). Enjoy guys!
